channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Judge declares a mistrial in Harvey Weinstein’s rape retrial after jury deadlocks
item.description: Harvey Weinstein’s rape retrial has ended in a mistrial. A judge declared it Friday after the jury deadlocked.

item.title: New US House map in Florida accused of violating state ban on partisan gerrymandering
Trump administration prepares to seek Raúl Castro indictment as it pressures Cuba, AP sources say
